description: Perform Sensitized Emission FRET correction on the fluorescence microscopy images 'donor_channel.tif', 'acceptor_channel.tif', and 'fret_raw_channel.tif' located in '~/Fiji_Data/raw/fret_experiment/'. Create a corrected image named 'corrected_fret.tif' using the formula: Corrected_FRET = Raw_FRET - (0.28 * Donor) - (0.19 * Acceptor). The calculation must be performed with 32-bit float precision to maintain accuracy. Save the resulting image to '~/Fiji_Data/results/fret/corrected_fret.tif'.
